mapper.select: select r.role_code from tbl_admin_user_role ur join tbl_role r on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.admin_user_id = #{userId}
select distinct p.perm_code from tbl_admin_user_role ur join tbl_role_permission rp on ur.role_id = rp.role_id join tbl_permission p on rp.permission_id = p.id where ur.admin_user_id = #{userId}

select distinct p.id, p.perm_code, p.perm_name, p.perm_desc from tbl_admin_user_role ur join tbl_role_permission rp on ur.role_id = rp.role_id join tbl_permission p on rp.permission_id = p.id where ur.admin_user_id = #{userId}

select u.id as user_id, u.username, u.display_name, u.status, r.role_code from tbl_admin_user u left join tbl_admin_user_role ur on u.id = ur.admin_user_id left join tbl_role r on ur.role_id = r.id order by u.id

select id, role_code, role_name, role_desc from tbl_role where role_code in
#{roleCode}
select id, role_code, role_name, role_desc from tbl_role order by id
select id, perm_code, perm_name, perm_desc from tbl_permission order by id
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_admin_user (username, password_hash, display_name, status) values (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{status})
